title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh, Associate Professor at CU Boulder, argues that teaching AI by hand at human speed and focusing on mathematical foundations rather than latest tools creates durable skills that survive hype cycles. He contends that people, not AI, drive meaningful change in AI development.
